summary: Implemented work_1 runner contract in allowed paths: added single execution model wrapper invokeStage using spawnSync-only execution, deterministic runPipeline with explicit ordered stages and fail-fast stopping, explicit workspace path resolution via pipeline context, default ingest stages that pass explicit input/output paths through env, CLI entrypoint requiring --video and --output-dir, and exports in src/index.js. Added deterministic tests for execution ordering, fail-fast behavior, invoke-stage execution model, CLI argument handling, and pipeline context path resolution. Updated package test script to the work_1 test suite and validated all tests pass.
